context: Tests whether the agent reads the tech-debt register and the referenced spec files, evaluates each item across the four assessment dimensions, correctly categorises every item, and formats the report into the four prescribed summary sections.

checklist.name: Reads spec files
checklist.description: The report references content from at least 3 of the 5 linked spec files (e.g., mentions the deviation, acceptance criteria, or context found only in the spec documents), indicating the agent read them

checklist.name: Relevance assessment
checklist.description: For at least 3 items the report explicitly states whether the item is still relevant or has been resolved incidentally

checklist.name: Blast radius assessment
checklist.description: For at least 3 items the report explicitly describes the blast radius (e.g., single file, feature-wide, cross-cutting)

checklist.name: Compounding assessment
checklist.description: For at least 2 items the report explicitly addresses whether the debt is getting worse or will be compounded by future work

checklist.name: Quick-fix time assessment
checklist.description: For at least 2 items the report explicitly addresses whether the item can be resolved in under 1 hour

checklist.name: Five categories used
checklist.description: The report uses at least 3 of the 5 categorisation labels: 'Resolved incidentally', 'Quick fix', 'Needs a spec', 'Accept and defer', 'No longer relevant'

checklist.name: Resolved/no-longer-relevant section
checklist.description: Report contains a distinct section for items that are resolved or no longer relevant

checklist.name: Quick-fixes section
checklist.description: Report contains a distinct section listing quick fixes that can be done immediately

checklist.name: Needs-a-spec section
checklist.description: Report contains a distinct section for items that require a full spec, with priority recommendation

checklist.name: Defer section
checklist.description: Report contains a distinct section for items to defer, with rationale for deferral

checklist.name: ai:plan reference
checklist.description: For at least one item categorised as needing a spec, the report recommends filing a `ai:plan` GitHub issue
